name: AAC Block Masonry

name: Light Gauge Steel Partition

name: Clay Brick Masonry

name: Stone Masonry

description: Common reinforced concrete slab grade used in residential and commercial structures.

name: RCC M30 Cast In-Situ Slab

name: Precast Hollow Core Slab
description: Factory produced prestressed slab with voids for lower self weight and faster erection.

name: Composite Metal Deck With Concrete
description: Steel deck and concrete composite slab system with efficient construction cycle.

name: Cross Laminated Timber Panel

name: Steel Box Column

name: Concrete Filled Steel Tube Column
description: Composite column system combining steel tube confinement with concrete core strength.

name: Structural Steel I-Beam

name: Prestressed Concrete Beam

name: Laminated Veneer Lumber Beam

name: Open Web Steel Truss

name: Calcium Silicate Block Masonry

name: Double Layer Gypsum Partition

name: Glass Block Partition

name: Solid Concrete Block Masonry

name: RCC M35 Beam

name: Castellated Steel Beam
